name: Key Lime Cheesecake Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (3 ounces each) cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie crust using the flour as directed on the package for an unfilled one-crust pie in a 9-inch pie pan (See Note). Generously prick the crust with a fork.
2. Bake in a preheated oven at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 9 to 11 minutes, or until lightly browned. Cool.
3. To make the filling:
a. In a small saucepan, soften gelatin in lime juice for 5 minutes.
b. Blend in sugar and eggs. Heat over medium heat until it reaches a boil.
c. Reduce heat and boil gently for 3 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. In a small bowl, combine cream cheese and butter; beat well. Pour the hot lime juice mixture into the gelatin, sugar, and egg mixture and beat until smooth and well blended. Refrigerate until cool, about 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. In a medium bowl, whip the cream until stiff peaks form. Fold in the cooled lime juice mixture and grated lime peel. Spoon into the cooled pie crust.
6. Refrigerate until firm, about 2 hours. Garnish with whipped cream and lime slices. Store in the refrigerator.
7. To create starburst design:
a. Trim the dough even with the edge of the pan.
b. Cut the dough at about 1/2-inch intervals all around the edges, making each cut 1/2 inch long.
c. Fold each square diagonally to form a triangle, pressing lightly into the dough.
